id.description: A unique integer value identifying this dashboard.

widgets.description: Widget tiles to add atomically. Supported widget_type values: activity_events_list, error_tracking_list, experiment_results, experiments_list, logs_list, session_replay_list. Use dashboard-widget-catalog-list for per-type config_schema documentation. (1–10 per request).

config.description: Configuration for the recent events widget.

eventName.description: Limit the feed to a single event name. Omit or null for all events.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

description.description: Optional markdown description shown when show_description is enabled.

layouts.description: Optional react-grid-layout positions keyed by breakpoint (sm, xs).

sm.description: Layout for the standard (desktop) breakpoint. The grid is 12 columns wide.

w.description: Width in grid columns. The desktop grid is 12 columns wide.

x.description: Column position in the dashboard grid (0-indexed).

y.description: Row position in the dashboard grid (0-indexed).

xs.description: Layout for the small (mobile) breakpoint. The grid is 1 column wide.

w.description: Width in grid columns. The desktop grid is 12 columns wide.

x.description: Column position in the dashboard grid (0-indexed).

y.description: Row position in the dashboard grid (0-indexed).

name.description: Optional custom display name for the widget tile.

show_description.description: Whether to show the description on the dashboard tile.

config.description: Configuration for the top issues widget.

assignee.description: Filter by assignee ({type: user|role, id}). Omit for any assignee.

limit.description: Maximum number of issues to return.

description.description: Optional markdown description shown when show_description is enabled.

layouts.description: Optional react-grid-layout positions keyed by breakpoint (sm, xs).

sm.description: Layout for the standard (desktop) breakpoint. The grid is 12 columns wide.

w.description: Width in grid columns. The desktop grid is 12 columns wide.

y.description: Row position in the dashboard grid (0-indexed).

name.description: Optional custom display name for the widget tile.

show_description.description: Whether to show the description on the dashboard tile.

config.description: Configuration for the recent recordings widget.

collectionId.description: short_id of a session replay collection to scope the widget to its pinned recordings. Combine with savedFilterId or property filters to narrow within the collection; orderBy, orderDirection, and limit still apply.

limit.description: Maximum number of recordings to return.

savedFilterId.description: short_id of a saved session replay filter to refine the recordings shown. When set, the saved filter owns the date range and property filters; only orderBy, orderDirection, and limit still apply. Combine with collectionId to filter within a collection.

description.description: Optional markdown description shown when show_description is enabled.

sm.description: Layout for the standard (desktop) breakpoint. The grid is 12 columns wide.

y.description: Row position in the dashboard grid (0-indexed).

createdBy.description: Filter by creator (user id). Omit for any creator.

limit.description: Maximum number of experiments to return.

experimentId.description: Experiment to show results for. Null until the user picks one in the widget settings.

config.description: Configuration for the recent logs widget.

limit.description: Maximum number of log lines to return.

orderBy.description: Sort by newest (latest) or oldest (earliest) first.

savedViewId.description: short_id of a saved logs view to use as the source. When set, the saved view owns the date range, severity, service, and property filters; only orderBy and limit still apply.

serviceNames.description: Only show logs from these services. Empty shows all services.

severityLevels.description: Only show logs at these severity levels. Empty shows all levels.

timezone.description: Render log timestamps in UTC or in each viewer's local timezone.

wrapLines.description: Wrap long log lines instead of truncating them to a single row.
